title: In Praise of God
fullText:
أَلْحَمْدُ للهِ

Praise belongs to God,

الاوَّلِ بِلا أَوَّل كَانَ قَبْلَهُ،

the First, without a first before Him,

وَ الاخِر بِلاَ آخِر يَكُونُ بَعْدَهُ

the Last, without a last behind Him.

،الَّذِي قَصُرَتْ عَنْ رُؤْيَتِهِ أَبْصَارُ النَّاظِرِينَ

Beholders' eyes fall short of seeing Him,

وَ عَجَزَتْ عَنْ نَعْتِهِ أَوهامُ اَلْوَاصِفِينَ

describers' imaginations are not able to depict Him.

ابْتَدَعَ بِقُدْرَتِهِ الْخَلْقَ اَبتِدَاعَاً،

He originated the creatures through His power with an origination,

وَاخْتَرَعَهُمْ عَلَى مَشِيَّتِهِ اخترَاعاً،

He devised them in accordance with His will with a devising.

ثُمَّ سَلَكَ بِهِمْ طَرِيقَ إرَادَتِهِ،

Then He made them walk on the path of His desire,

وَبَعَثَهُمْ فِي سَبِيلِ مَحَبَّتِهِ

He sent them out on the way of His love.

لايَمْلِكُونَ تَأخِيراً عَمَا قَدَّمَهُمْ إليْهِ

They cannot keep back from that to which He has sent them forward,

وَلا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ تَقَدُّماً إلَى مَا أَخَّرَهُمْ عَنْهُ،

nor can they go forward to that from which He has kept them back.

وَ جَعَلَ لِكُلِّ رُوْح مِنْهُمْ

He assigned from His provision to each of their spirits

قُوتَاً مَعْلُوماً مَقْسُوماً مِنْ رِزْقِهِ

a nourishment known and apportioned.

لاَ يَنْقُصُ مَنْ زادَهُ نَاقِصٌ،

No decreaser decreases those whom He increases,

وَلاَ يَزِيدُ مَنْ نَقَصَ منْهُمْ زَائِدٌ

no increaser increases those of them whom He decreases.

ثُمَّ ضَرَبَ لَهُ فِي الْحَيَاةِ أَجَلاً مَوْقُوتاً،

Then for each spirit He strikes a fixed term in life,

وَ نَصَبَ لَهُ أَمَداً مَحْدُوداً،

for each He sets up a determined end;

يَتَخَطَّأُ إلَيهِ بِأَيَّامِ عُمُرِهِ،

he walks toward it through the days of his span,

وَيَرْهَقُهُ بِأَعْوَامِ دَهْرِهِ،

he overtakes it through the years of his time.

حَتَّى إذَا بَلَغَ أَقْصَى أَثَرِهِ،

Then, when he takes his final step

وَ اسْتَوْعَبَ حِسابَ عُمُرِهِ،

and embraces the reckoning of his span,

قَبَضهُ إلَى ما نَدَبَهُ إلَيْهِ

God seizes him to the abundant reward

مِنْ مَوْفُورِ ثَوَابِهِ أَوْ مَحْذُورِ عِقَابِهِ،

or the feared punishment to which He has called him,

لِيَجْزِيَ الَّذِينَ أَساءُوا بِمَا عَمِلُوا

"That He may repay those who do evil for what they have done

وَ يَجْزِىَ الَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا بِالْحُسْنَى

and repay those who do good with goodness" (53:31),

عَدْلاً مِنْهُ تَقَدَّسَتْ أَسْمَآؤُهُ،

as justice from Him (holy are His names,

وَتَظَاهَرَتْ ألاؤُهُ،

and manifest His boons).

لاَ يُسْأَلُ عَمَّا يَفْعَلُ وَهُمْ يُسْأَلُونَ

"He shall not be questioned as to what He does, but they shall be questioned" (21:23).

وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي لَوْ حَبَسَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِ مَعْرِفَةَ

Praise belongs to God, for, had He withheld from His servants the knowledge

حَمْدِهِ عَلَى مَا أَبْلاَهُمْ مِنْ مِنَنِهِ الْمُتَتَابِعَةِ

to praise Him for the uninterrupted kindnesses with which He has tried them

وَأَسْبَغَ عَلَيْهِمْ رمِنْ نِعَمِهِ الْمُتَظَاهِرَة

and the manifest favours which He has lavished upon them,

لَتَصرَّفُوا فِي مِنَنِهِ فَلَمْ يَحْمَدُوهُ

they would have moved about in His kindnesses without praising Him,

وَتَوَسَّعُوا فِي رِزْقِهِ فَلَمْ يَشْكُرُوهُ،

and spread themselves out in His provision without thanking Him.

وَلَوْ كَانُوا كَذلِكَ لَخَرَجُوا مِنْ حُدُودِ الانْسَانِيَّةِ

Had such been the case, they would have left the bounds of humanity

إلَى حَدِّ الْبَهِيمِيَّةِ،

for that of beastliness

:فَكَانُوا كَمَا وَصَفَ فِي مُحْكَم كِتَابِهِ

and become as He has described in the firm text of His Book:

( إنْ هُمْ إلا كَالانْعَامِ بَلْ هُمْ أَضَلُّ سَبِيلا )

"They are but as the cattle—nay, but they are further astray from the way"! (25:46)

وَالْحَمْدُ لله عَلَى مَا عَرَّفَنا من نفسه

Praise belongs to God, for the true knowledge of Himself He has given to us,

وَأَلْهَمَنَا مِنْ شُكْرِهِ

the thanksgiving He has inspired us to offer Him,

وَفَتَحَ لَنَا من أبوَابِ الْعِلْمِ بِرُبُوبِيّته

the doors to knowing His Lordship He has opened for us,

وَدَلَّنَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ الاِخْلاَصِ لَهُ فِي تَوْحِيدِهِ

the sincerity towards Him in professing His Unity to which He has led us,

وَجَنَّبَنا مِنَ الالْحَادِ وَالشَّكِّ فِي أَمْرِهِ،

and the deviation and doubt in His Command from which He has turned us aside;

حَمْداً نُعَمَّرُ بِهِ فِيمَنْ حَمِدَهُ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ

a praise through which we may be given long life among those of His creatures who praise Him,

وَنَسْبِقُ بِـهِ مَنْ سَبَقَ إلَى رِضَاهُ وَعَفْوِهِ

and overtake those who have gone ahead toward His good pleasure and pardon;

حَمْداً يُضِيءُ لَنَا بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الْبَرْزَخِ

a praise through which He will illuminate for us the shadows of the interworld,

وَيُسَهِّلُ عَلَيْنَا بِهِ سَبِيلَ الْمَبْعَثِ

ease for us the path of the Resurrection,

وَيُشَرِّفُ بِهِ مَنَازِلَنَا عِنْدَ مَوَاقِفِ الاشْهَادِ

and raise up our stations at the standing places of the Witnesses

يَوْمَ تُجْزَى كُلُّ نَفْس بِمَا كَسَبَتْ وَهُمْ لا يُظْلَمُونَ

"on the day when every soul will be repaid for what it has earned - they shall not be wronged" (45:21);

(يَوْمَ لاَ يُغْنِي مَوْلىً عَنْ مَوْلىً شَيْئاً وَلاَ هُمْ يُنْصَرُونَ)

"the day a master shall avail nothing a client, and they shall not be helped" (44:41);

حَمْداً يَرْتَفِعُ مِنَّا إلَى أَعْلَى عِلِّيِّينَ

a praise which will rise up from us to the highest of the 'Illiyun

فِي كِتَاب مَرْقُوم يَشْهَدُهُ الْمُقَرَّبُونَ،

"in a book inscribed, witnessed by those brought nigh" (83:20-21),

حَمْداً تَقَرُّ بِهِ عُيُونُنَا إذَا بَرِقَت الابْصَارُ

a praise whereby our eyes may be at rest when sight is dazzled,

وَتَبْيَضُّ بِهِ وُجُوهُنَا إذَا اسْوَدَّتِ الابْشَارُ،

our faces whitened when skins are blackened,

حَمْداً نُعْتَقُ بِهِ مِنْ أَلِيمِ نار الله

a praise through which we may be released from God's painful Fire

الى كَرِيمِ جِوَارِ اللهِ

and enter God's generous neighbourhood,

حَمْداً نُزَاحِمُ بِهِ مَلاَئِكَتَهُ الْمُقَرَّبِينَ

a praise by which we may jostle the angels brought nigh

وَنُضَامُّ بِـهِ أَنْبِيآءَهُ الْمُـرْسَلِيْنَ

and join the prophets, the envoys,

فِي دَارِ الْمُقَامَةِ الَّتِي لا تَزُولُ

in a House of Permanence that does not remove,

وَمَحَلِّ كَرَامَتِهِ الَّتِي لاَ تَحُولُ

the Place of His Generosity that does not change.

وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي اخْتَارَ لَنَا مَحَاسِنَ الْخَلْقِ

Praise belongs to God, who chose for us the good qualities of creation,

وَأَجرى عَلَيْنَا طَيِّبَاتِ الرِّزْقِ

granted us the agreeable things of provision,

وَجَعَلَ لَنَا الفَضِيلَةَ بِالْمَلَكَةِ عَلَى جَمِيعِ الْخَلْقِ

and appointed for us excellence through domination over all creation;

فَكُلُّ خَلِيقَتِهِ مُنْقَادَةٌ لَنَا بِقُدْرَتِهِ،

every one of His creatures submits to us through His power

وَصَآئِرَةٌ إلَى طَاعَتِنَا بِعِزَّتِهِ

and comes to obey us through His might.

وَالْحَمْدُ لله الَّذِي أَغْلَقَ عَنَّا بَابَ الْحَّاجَةِ إلاّ إلَيْهِ

Praise belongs to God, who locked for us the gate of need except toward Him.

فَكَيْفَ نُطِيقُ حَمْدَهُ أَمْ مَتَى نُؤَدِّي شُكْرَهُ؟ لا، مَتى؟

So how can we praise Him? When can we thank Him? Indeed, when?

وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي رَكَّبَ فِينَا آلاَتِ الْبَسْطِ

Praise belongs to God, who placed within us the organs of expansion,

وَجَعَلَ لَنَا أدَوَاتِ الْقَبْضِ،

assigned for us the agents of contraction,

وَمَتَّعَنا بِاَرْواحِ الْحَياةِ

gave us to enjoy the spirits of life,

وَأثْبَتَ فِينَا جَوَارِحَالاعْمَال

fixed within us the limbs of works,

وَغَذَّانَا بِطَيِّبَاتِ الرِّزْقِ ،

nourished us with the agreeable things of provision,

وَأغْنانَا بِفَضْلِهِ

freed us from need through His bounty,

وَأقْنانَا بِمَنِّهِ

and gave us possessions through His kindness.

ثُمّ أَمَرَنَا لِيَخْتَبِرَطاعَتَنَا،

Then He commanded us that He might test our obedience

وَنَهَانَا لِيَبْتَلِيَ شُكْرَنَا فَخَالَفْنَا عَنْ طَرِيْقِ أمْرِهِ

and prohibited us that He might try our thanksgiving. So we turned against the path of His commandments

وَرَكِبْنا مُتُونَ زَجْرهِ ِ

and mounted the backs of His warnings.

فَلَم يَبْتَدِرْنابِعُقُوبَتِه وَلَمْ يُعَاجِلْنَا بِنِقْمَتِهِ

Yet He hurried us not to His punishment,nor hastened us on to His vengeance, ,

بَلْ تَانَّانا بِرَحْمَتِهِ تَكَرُّماً، وَانْتَظَرَ مُراجَعَتَنَا بِرَأفَتِهِ حِلْماً.

No, He went slowly with us through His mercy, in generosity, and awaited our return through His clemency, in mildness.

وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي دَلَّنَاعَلَى التَّوْبَةِ

Praise belongs to God, who showed us the way to repentance,

الَّتِي لَمْ نُفِدْهَا إلاّ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ،

which we would not have won save through His bounty.

فَلَوْ لَمْ نَعْتَدِدْ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ

Had we nothing to count as His bounty

إلاّ بِهَالَقَدْ حَسُنَ بَلاؤُهُ عِنْدَنَا،

but this, His trial of us would have been good,

وَ جَلَّ إحْسَانُهُ إلَيْنَا،

His beneficence toward us great,

وَ جَسُمَ فَضْلُهُ عَلَيْنَا

His bounty upon us immense.

فَمَا هكذا كَانَتْ سُنَّتُهُ فِي التَّوْبَةِ

For such was not His wont in repentance

لِمَنْ كَانَ قَبْلَنَا

with those who went before us.

لَقَدْ وَضَعَ عَنَّا

He has lifted up from us

مَا لا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِ،

"what we have not the strength to bear"(2:286) ,

وَلَمْ يُكَلِّفْنَا إلاّ وُسْعاً،

charged us only to our capacity,

وَ لَمْ يُجَشِّمْنَا إلاّ يُسْراً

imposed upon us nothing but ease,

وَلَمْ يَدَعْ لاَحَـد مِنَّا حُجَّةً وَلاَ عُذْراً

and left none of us with an argument or excuse.

فَالْهَالِكُ مِنَّا مَنْ هَلَكَ عَلَيْهِ

So the perisher among us is he who perishes in spite of Him

وَ السَّعِيدُ مِنَّا مَنْرَغِبَ إلَيْهِ

and the felicitous among us he who beseeches Him.

وَ الْحَمْد للهِ بِكُلِّ مَا حَمِدَهُ بِهِ

And praise belongs to God with all the praises of

أدْنَى مَلائِكَتِهِ إلَيْهِ

His angels closest to Him,

وَ أَكْرَمُ خَلِيقَتِهِ عَلَيْهِ

His creatures most noble in His eyes,

وَأرْضَىحَامِدِيْهِ لَدَيْهِ

and His praisers most pleasing to Him;

حَمْداً يَفْضُلُ سَآئِرَ الْحَمْدِ

a praise that may surpass other praises

كَفَضْلِ رَبِّنا عَلَى جَمِيعِ خَلْقِهِ

as our Lord surpasses all His creatures.

ثُمَّ لَهُ الْحَمْدُ

Then to Him belongs praise,

مَكَانَ كُلِّ نِعْمَة لَهُ عَلَيْنَا

in place of His every favour upon us

وَ عَلى جَمِيعِ عِبَادِهِ الْمَاضِينَ وَالْبَاقِينَ

and upon all His servants, past and still remaining,

عَدَدَ مَا أَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُهُ مِنْ جَمِيعِالاشْيَآءِ

to the number of all things His knowledge encompasses,

وَ مَكَانَ كُلِّ وَاحِدَة مِنْهَا عَدَدُهَا

and in place of each of His favours,

أَضْعافَاً مُضَاعَفَةً أَبَداً سَرْمَداً إلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ

their number doubling and redoubling always and forever, to the Day of Resurrection;

حَمْداً لاَ مُنْتَهَى لِحَدِّهِ

a praise whose bound has no utmost end,

وَ لا حِسَابَ لِعَدَدِهِ

whose number has no reckoning,

وَ لاَ مَبْلَغَ لِغَايَتِهِ

whose limit cannot be reached,

وَ لا انْقِطَاعَ لاَمَدِهِ

whose period cannot be cut off;

حَمْدَاً يَكُونُ وُصْلَةً إلَى طَاعَتِهِ وَعَفْوِهِ

a praise which will become a link to His obedience and pardon,

وَ سَبَباً إلَى رِضْوَانِهِ

a tie to His good pleasure,

وَذَرِيعَةً إلَى مَغْفِرَتِهِ

a means to His forgiveness,

وَ طَرِيقاً إلَى جَنَّتِهِ

a path to His Garden,

وَخَفِيْراً مِنْ نَقِمَتِهِ

a protector against His vengeance,

وَ أَمْناً مِنْ غَضَبِهِ

a security against His wrath,

وَ ظَهِيْراً عَلَى طَاعَتِهِ

an aid to obeying Him,

وَ حَاجِزاً عَنْ مَعْصِيَتِهِ

a barrier against disobeying Him,

وَعَوْناً عَلَى تَأدِيَةِ حَقِّهِ وَ وَظائِفِهِ

a help in fulfilling His right and His duties;

حَمْداً نَسْعَدُ بِهِ فِي السُّعَدَاءِ مِنْ أَوْلِيَآئِهِ

a praise that will make us felicitous among His felicitous friends,

وَنَصِيرُ بِهِ فِي نَظْمِ الشُّهَدَآءِ بِسُيُوفِ أَعْدَائِهِ

and bring us into the ranks of those martyred by the swords of His enemies.

إنَّهُ وَلِيٌّ حَمِيدٌ

He is a Friend, Praiseworthy!

lines.text: أَلْحَمْدُ للهِ
Praise belongs to God,
الاوَّلِ بِلا أَوَّل كَانَ قَبْلَهُ،
the First, without a first before Him,
وَ الاخِر بِلاَ آخِر يَكُونُ بَعْدَهُ
the Last, without a last behind Him.
،الَّذِي قَصُرَتْ عَنْ رُؤْيَتِهِ أَبْصَارُ النَّاظِرِينَ
Beholders' eyes fall short of seeing Him,
وَ عَجَزَتْ عَنْ نَعْتِهِ أَوهامُ اَلْوَاصِفِينَ
describers' imaginations are not able to depict Him.
ابْتَدَعَ بِقُدْرَتِهِ الْخَلْقَ اَبتِدَاعَاً،
He originated the creatures through His power with an origination,
وَاخْتَرَعَهُمْ عَلَى مَشِيَّتِهِ اخترَاعاً،
He devised them in accordance with His will with a devising.
ثُمَّ سَلَكَ بِهِمْ طَرِيقَ إرَادَتِهِ،
Then He made them walk on the path of His desire,
وَبَعَثَهُمْ فِي سَبِيلِ مَحَبَّتِهِ
He sent them out on the way of His love.
لايَمْلِكُونَ تَأخِيراً عَمَا قَدَّمَهُمْ إليْهِ
They cannot keep back from that to which He has sent them forward,
وَلا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ تَقَدُّماً إلَى مَا أَخَّرَهُمْ عَنْهُ،
nor can they go forward to that from which He has kept them back.
وَ جَعَلَ لِكُلِّ رُوْح مِنْهُمْ
He assigned from His provision to each of their spirits
قُوتَاً مَعْلُوماً مَقْسُوماً مِنْ رِزْقِهِ
a nourishment known and apportioned.
لاَ يَنْقُصُ مَنْ زادَهُ نَاقِصٌ،
No decreaser decreases those whom He increases,
وَلاَ يَزِيدُ مَنْ نَقَصَ منْهُمْ زَائِدٌ
no increaser increases those of them whom He decreases.
ثُمَّ ضَرَبَ لَهُ فِي الْحَيَاةِ أَجَلاً مَوْقُوتاً،
Then for each spirit He strikes a fixed term in life,
وَ نَصَبَ لَهُ أَمَداً مَحْدُوداً،
for each He sets up a determined end;
يَتَخَطَّأُ إلَيهِ بِأَيَّامِ عُمُرِهِ،
he walks toward it through the days of his span,
وَيَرْهَقُهُ بِأَعْوَامِ دَهْرِهِ،
he overtakes it through the years of his time.
حَتَّى إذَا بَلَغَ أَقْصَى أَثَرِهِ،
Then, when he takes his final step
وَ اسْتَوْعَبَ حِسابَ عُمُرِهِ،
and embraces the reckoning of his span,
قَبَضهُ إلَى ما نَدَبَهُ إلَيْهِ
God seizes him to the abundant reward
مِنْ مَوْفُورِ ثَوَابِهِ أَوْ مَحْذُورِ عِقَابِهِ،
or the feared punishment to which He has called him,
لِيَجْزِيَ الَّذِينَ أَساءُوا بِمَا عَمِلُوا
"That He may repay those who do evil for what they have done
وَ يَجْزِىَ الَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا بِالْحُسْنَى
and repay those who do good with goodness" (53:31),
عَدْلاً مِنْهُ تَقَدَّسَتْ أَسْمَآؤُهُ،
as justice from Him (holy are His names,
وَتَظَاهَرَتْ ألاؤُهُ،
and manifest His boons).
لاَ يُسْأَلُ عَمَّا يَفْعَلُ وَهُمْ يُسْأَلُونَ
"He shall not be questioned as to what He does, but they shall be questioned" (21:23).
وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي لَوْ حَبَسَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِ مَعْرِفَةَ
Praise belongs to God, for, had He withheld from His servants the knowledge
حَمْدِهِ عَلَى مَا أَبْلاَهُمْ مِنْ مِنَنِهِ الْمُتَتَابِعَةِ
to praise Him for the uninterrupted kindnesses with which He has tried them
وَأَسْبَغَ عَلَيْهِمْ رمِنْ نِعَمِهِ الْمُتَظَاهِرَة
and the manifest favours which He has lavished upon them,
لَتَصرَّفُوا فِي مِنَنِهِ فَلَمْ يَحْمَدُوهُ
they would have moved about in His kindnesses without praising Him,
وَتَوَسَّعُوا فِي رِزْقِهِ فَلَمْ يَشْكُرُوهُ،
and spread themselves out in His provision without thanking Him.
وَلَوْ كَانُوا كَذلِكَ لَخَرَجُوا مِنْ حُدُودِ الانْسَانِيَّةِ
Had such been the case, they would have left the bounds of humanity
إلَى حَدِّ الْبَهِيمِيَّةِ،
for that of beastliness
:فَكَانُوا كَمَا وَصَفَ فِي مُحْكَم كِتَابِهِ
and become as He has described in the firm text of His Book:
( إنْ هُمْ إلا كَالانْعَامِ بَلْ هُمْ أَضَلُّ سَبِيلا )
"They are but as the cattle—nay, but they are further astray from the way"! (25:46)
وَالْحَمْدُ لله عَلَى مَا عَرَّفَنا من نفسه
Praise belongs to God, for the true knowledge of Himself He has given to us,
وَأَلْهَمَنَا مِنْ شُكْرِهِ
the thanksgiving He has inspired us to offer Him,
وَفَتَحَ لَنَا من أبوَابِ الْعِلْمِ بِرُبُوبِيّته
the doors to knowing His Lordship He has opened for us,
وَدَلَّنَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ الاِخْلاَصِ لَهُ فِي تَوْحِيدِهِ
the sincerity towards Him in professing His Unity to which He has led us,
وَجَنَّبَنا مِنَ الالْحَادِ وَالشَّكِّ فِي أَمْرِهِ،
and the deviation and doubt in His Command from which He has turned us aside;
حَمْداً نُعَمَّرُ بِهِ فِيمَنْ حَمِدَهُ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ
a praise through which we may be given long life among those of His creatures who praise Him,
وَنَسْبِقُ بِـهِ مَنْ سَبَقَ إلَى رِضَاهُ وَعَفْوِهِ
and overtake those who have gone ahead toward His good pleasure and pardon;
حَمْداً يُضِيءُ لَنَا بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الْبَرْزَخِ
a praise through which He will illuminate for us the shadows of the interworld,
وَيُسَهِّلُ عَلَيْنَا بِهِ سَبِيلَ الْمَبْعَثِ
ease for us the path of the Resurrection,
وَيُشَرِّفُ بِهِ مَنَازِلَنَا عِنْدَ مَوَاقِفِ الاشْهَادِ
and raise up our stations at the standing places of the Witnesses
يَوْمَ تُجْزَى كُلُّ نَفْس بِمَا كَسَبَتْ وَهُمْ لا يُظْلَمُونَ
"on the day when every soul will be repaid for what it has earned - they shall not be wronged" (45:21);
(يَوْمَ لاَ يُغْنِي مَوْلىً عَنْ مَوْلىً شَيْئاً وَلاَ هُمْ يُنْصَرُونَ)
"the day a master shall avail nothing a client, and they shall not be helped" (44:41);
حَمْداً يَرْتَفِعُ مِنَّا إلَى أَعْلَى عِلِّيِّينَ
a praise which will rise up from us to the highest of the 'Illiyun
فِي كِتَاب مَرْقُوم يَشْهَدُهُ الْمُقَرَّبُونَ،
"in a book inscribed, witnessed by those brought nigh" (83:20-21),
حَمْداً تَقَرُّ بِهِ عُيُونُنَا إذَا بَرِقَت الابْصَارُ
a praise whereby our eyes may be at rest when sight is dazzled,
وَتَبْيَضُّ بِهِ وُجُوهُنَا إذَا اسْوَدَّتِ الابْشَارُ،
our faces whitened when skins are blackened,
حَمْداً نُعْتَقُ بِهِ مِنْ أَلِيمِ نار الله
a praise through which we may be released from God's painful Fire
الى كَرِيمِ جِوَارِ اللهِ
and enter God's generous neighbourhood,
حَمْداً نُزَاحِمُ بِهِ مَلاَئِكَتَهُ الْمُقَرَّبِينَ
a praise by which we may jostle the angels brought nigh
وَنُضَامُّ بِـهِ أَنْبِيآءَهُ الْمُـرْسَلِيْنَ
and join the prophets, the envoys,
فِي دَارِ الْمُقَامَةِ الَّتِي لا تَزُولُ
in a House of Permanence that does not remove,
وَمَحَلِّ كَرَامَتِهِ الَّتِي لاَ تَحُولُ
the Place of His Generosity that does not change.
وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي اخْتَارَ لَنَا مَحَاسِنَ الْخَلْقِ
Praise belongs to God, who chose for us the good qualities of creation,
وَأَجرى عَلَيْنَا طَيِّبَاتِ الرِّزْقِ
granted us the agreeable things of provision,
وَجَعَلَ لَنَا الفَضِيلَةَ بِالْمَلَكَةِ عَلَى جَمِيعِ الْخَلْقِ
and appointed for us excellence through domination over all creation;
فَكُلُّ خَلِيقَتِهِ مُنْقَادَةٌ لَنَا بِقُدْرَتِهِ،
every one of His creatures submits to us through His power
وَصَآئِرَةٌ إلَى طَاعَتِنَا بِعِزَّتِهِ
and comes to obey us through His might.
وَالْحَمْدُ لله الَّذِي أَغْلَقَ عَنَّا بَابَ الْحَّاجَةِ إلاّ إلَيْهِ
Praise belongs to God, who locked for us the gate of need except toward Him.
فَكَيْفَ نُطِيقُ حَمْدَهُ أَمْ مَتَى نُؤَدِّي شُكْرَهُ؟ لا، مَتى؟
So how can we praise Him? When can we thank Him? Indeed, when?
وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي رَكَّبَ فِينَا آلاَتِ الْبَسْطِ
Praise belongs to God, who placed within us the organs of expansion,
وَجَعَلَ لَنَا أدَوَاتِ الْقَبْضِ،
assigned for us the agents of contraction,
وَمَتَّعَنا بِاَرْواحِ الْحَياةِ
gave us to enjoy the spirits of life,
وَأثْبَتَ فِينَا جَوَارِحَالاعْمَال
fixed within us the limbs of works,
وَغَذَّانَا بِطَيِّبَاتِ الرِّزْقِ ،
nourished us with the agreeable things of provision,
وَأغْنانَا بِفَضْلِهِ
freed us from need through His bounty,
وَأقْنانَا بِمَنِّهِ
and gave us possessions through His kindness.
ثُمّ أَمَرَنَا لِيَخْتَبِرَطاعَتَنَا،
Then He commanded us that He might test our obedience
وَنَهَانَا لِيَبْتَلِيَ شُكْرَنَا فَخَالَفْنَا عَنْ طَرِيْقِ أمْرِهِ
and prohibited us that He might try our thanksgiving. So we turned against the path of His commandments
وَرَكِبْنا مُتُونَ زَجْرهِ ِ
and mounted the backs of His warnings.
فَلَم يَبْتَدِرْنابِعُقُوبَتِه وَلَمْ يُعَاجِلْنَا بِنِقْمَتِهِ
Yet He hurried us not to His punishment,nor hastened us on to His vengeance, ,
بَلْ تَانَّانا بِرَحْمَتِهِ تَكَرُّماً، وَانْتَظَرَ مُراجَعَتَنَا بِرَأفَتِهِ حِلْماً.
No, He went slowly with us through His mercy, in generosity, and awaited our return through His clemency, in mildness.
وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي دَلَّنَاعَلَى التَّوْبَةِ
Praise belongs to God, who showed us the way to repentance,
الَّتِي لَمْ نُفِدْهَا إلاّ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ،
which we would not have won save through His bounty.
فَلَوْ لَمْ نَعْتَدِدْ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ
Had we nothing to count as His bounty
إلاّ بِهَالَقَدْ حَسُنَ بَلاؤُهُ عِنْدَنَا،
but this, His trial of us would have been good,
وَ جَلَّ إحْسَانُهُ إلَيْنَا،
His beneficence toward us great,
وَ جَسُمَ فَضْلُهُ عَلَيْنَا
His bounty upon us immense.
فَمَا هكذا كَانَتْ سُنَّتُهُ فِي التَّوْبَةِ
For such was not His wont in repentance
لِمَنْ كَانَ قَبْلَنَا
with those who went before us.
لَقَدْ وَضَعَ عَنَّا
He has lifted up from us
مَا لا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِ،
"what we have not the strength to bear"(2:286) ,
وَلَمْ يُكَلِّفْنَا إلاّ وُسْعاً،
charged us only to our capacity,
وَ لَمْ يُجَشِّمْنَا إلاّ يُسْراً
imposed upon us nothing but ease,
وَلَمْ يَدَعْ لاَحَـد مِنَّا حُجَّةً وَلاَ عُذْراً
and left none of us with an argument or excuse.
فَالْهَالِكُ مِنَّا مَنْ هَلَكَ عَلَيْهِ
So the perisher among us is he who perishes in spite of Him
وَ السَّعِيدُ مِنَّا مَنْرَغِبَ إلَيْهِ
and the felicitous among us he who beseeches Him.
وَ الْحَمْد للهِ بِكُلِّ مَا حَمِدَهُ بِهِ
And praise belongs to God with all the praises of
أدْنَى مَلائِكَتِهِ إلَيْهِ
His angels closest to Him,
وَ أَكْرَمُ خَلِيقَتِهِ عَلَيْهِ
His creatures most noble in His eyes,
وَأرْضَىحَامِدِيْهِ لَدَيْهِ
and His praisers most pleasing to Him;
حَمْداً يَفْضُلُ سَآئِرَ الْحَمْدِ
a praise that may surpass other praises
كَفَضْلِ رَبِّنا عَلَى جَمِيعِ خَلْقِهِ
as our Lord surpasses all His creatures.
ثُمَّ لَهُ الْحَمْدُ
Then to Him belongs praise,
مَكَانَ كُلِّ نِعْمَة لَهُ عَلَيْنَا
in place of His every favour upon us
وَ عَلى جَمِيعِ عِبَادِهِ الْمَاضِينَ وَالْبَاقِينَ
and upon all His servants, past and still remaining,
عَدَدَ مَا أَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُهُ مِنْ جَمِيعِالاشْيَآءِ
to the number of all things His knowledge encompasses,
وَ مَكَانَ كُلِّ وَاحِدَة مِنْهَا عَدَدُهَا
and in place of each of His favours,
أَضْعافَاً مُضَاعَفَةً أَبَداً سَرْمَداً إلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ
their number doubling and redoubling always and forever, to the Day of Resurrection;
حَمْداً لاَ مُنْتَهَى لِحَدِّهِ
a praise whose bound has no utmost end,
وَ لا حِسَابَ لِعَدَدِهِ
whose number has no reckoning,
وَ لاَ مَبْلَغَ لِغَايَتِهِ
whose limit cannot be reached,
وَ لا انْقِطَاعَ لاَمَدِهِ
whose period cannot be cut off;
حَمْدَاً يَكُونُ وُصْلَةً إلَى طَاعَتِهِ وَعَفْوِهِ
a praise which will become a link to His obedience and pardon,
وَ سَبَباً إلَى رِضْوَانِهِ
a tie to His good pleasure,
وَذَرِيعَةً إلَى مَغْفِرَتِهِ
a means to His forgiveness,
وَ طَرِيقاً إلَى جَنَّتِهِ
a path to His Garden,
وَخَفِيْراً مِنْ نَقِمَتِهِ
a protector against His vengeance,
وَ أَمْناً مِنْ غَضَبِهِ
a security against His wrath,
وَ ظَهِيْراً عَلَى طَاعَتِهِ
an aid to obeying Him,
وَ حَاجِزاً عَنْ مَعْصِيَتِهِ
a barrier against disobeying Him,
وَعَوْناً عَلَى تَأدِيَةِ حَقِّهِ وَ وَظائِفِهِ
a help in fulfilling His right and His duties;
حَمْداً نَسْعَدُ بِهِ فِي السُّعَدَاءِ مِنْ أَوْلِيَآئِهِ
a praise that will make us felicitous among His felicitous friends,
وَنَصِيرُ بِهِ فِي نَظْمِ الشُّهَدَآءِ بِسُيُوفِ أَعْدَائِهِ
and bring us into the ranks of those martyred by the swords of His enemies.
إنَّهُ وَلِيٌّ حَمِيدٌ
He is a Friend, Praiseworthy!

translations.text: Praise belongs to God,
the First, without a first before Him,

pairs.arabic: وَ الاخِر بِلاَ آخِر يَكُونُ بَعْدَهُ

translations.text: the Last, without a last behind Him.
Beholders' eyes fall short of seeing Him,

pairs.arabic: وَ عَجَزَتْ عَنْ نَعْتِهِ أَوهامُ اَلْوَاصِفِينَ

translations.text: describers' imaginations are not able to depict Him.
He originated the creatures through His power with an origination,
He devised them in accordance with His will with a devising.
Then He made them walk on the path of His desire,
He sent them out on the way of His love.
They cannot keep back from that to which He has sent them forward,

pairs.arabic: وَلا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ تَقَدُّماً إلَى مَا أَخَّرَهُمْ عَنْهُ،

translations.text: nor can they go forward to that from which He has kept them back.
He assigned from His provision to each of their spirits
a nourishment known and apportioned.
No decreaser decreases those whom He increases,

pairs.arabic: وَلاَ يَزِيدُ مَنْ نَقَصَ منْهُمْ زَائِدٌ

translations.text: no increaser increases those of them whom He decreases.

pairs.arabic: ثُمَّ ضَرَبَ لَهُ فِي الْحَيَاةِ أَجَلاً مَوْقُوتاً،

translations.text: Then for each spirit He strikes a fixed term in life,
for each He sets up a determined end;
he walks toward it through the days of his span,
he overtakes it through the years of his time.
Then, when he takes his final step
and embraces the reckoning of his span,
God seizes him to the abundant reward

pairs.arabic: مِنْ مَوْفُورِ ثَوَابِهِ أَوْ مَحْذُورِ عِقَابِهِ،

translations.text: or the feared punishment to which He has called him,
"That He may repay those who do evil for what they have done
and repay those who do good with goodness" (53:31),
as justice from Him (holy are His names,
and manifest His boons).

pairs.arabic: لاَ يُسْأَلُ عَمَّا يَفْعَلُ وَهُمْ يُسْأَلُونَ

translations.text: "He shall not be questioned as to what He does, but they shall be questioned" (21:23).

pairs.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي لَوْ حَبَسَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِ مَعْرِفَةَ

translations.text: Praise belongs to God, for, had He withheld from His servants the knowledge

pairs.arabic: حَمْدِهِ عَلَى مَا أَبْلاَهُمْ مِنْ مِنَنِهِ الْمُتَتَابِعَةِ

translations.text: to praise Him for the uninterrupted kindnesses with which He has tried them
and the manifest favours which He has lavished upon them,
they would have moved about in His kindnesses without praising Him,
and spread themselves out in His provision without thanking Him.

pairs.arabic: وَلَوْ كَانُوا كَذلِكَ لَخَرَجُوا مِنْ حُدُودِ الانْسَانِيَّةِ

translations.text: Had such been the case, they would have left the bounds of humanity
for that of beastliness
and become as He has described in the firm text of His Book:

pairs.arabic: ( إنْ هُمْ إلا كَالانْعَامِ بَلْ هُمْ أَضَلُّ سَبِيلا )

translations.text: "They are but as the cattle—nay, but they are further astray from the way"! (25:46)

pairs.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ لله عَلَى مَا عَرَّفَنا من نفسه

translations.text: Praise belongs to God, for the true knowledge of Himself He has given to us,
the thanksgiving He has inspired us to offer Him,

pairs.arabic: وَفَتَحَ لَنَا من أبوَابِ الْعِلْمِ بِرُبُوبِيّته

translations.text: the doors to knowing His Lordship He has opened for us,

pairs.arabic: وَدَلَّنَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ الاِخْلاَصِ لَهُ فِي تَوْحِيدِهِ

translations.text: the sincerity towards Him in professing His Unity to which He has led us,

pairs.arabic: وَجَنَّبَنا مِنَ الالْحَادِ وَالشَّكِّ فِي أَمْرِهِ،

translations.text: and the deviation and doubt in His Command from which He has turned us aside;

pairs.arabic: حَمْداً نُعَمَّرُ بِهِ فِيمَنْ حَمِدَهُ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ

translations.text: a praise through which we may be given long life among those of His creatures who praise Him,

pairs.arabic: وَنَسْبِقُ بِـهِ مَنْ سَبَقَ إلَى رِضَاهُ وَعَفْوِهِ

translations.text: and overtake those who have gone ahead toward His good pleasure and pardon;

pairs.arabic: حَمْداً يُضِيءُ لَنَا بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الْبَرْزَخِ

translations.text: a praise through which He will illuminate for us the shadows of the interworld,
ease for us the path of the Resurrection,

pairs.arabic: وَيُشَرِّفُ بِهِ مَنَازِلَنَا عِنْدَ مَوَاقِفِ الاشْهَادِ

translations.text: and raise up our stations at the standing places of the Witnesses

pairs.arabic: يَوْمَ تُجْزَى كُلُّ نَفْس بِمَا كَسَبَتْ وَهُمْ لا يُظْلَمُونَ

translations.text: "on the day when every soul will be repaid for what it has earned - they shall not be wronged" (45:21);

pairs.arabic: (يَوْمَ لاَ يُغْنِي مَوْلىً عَنْ مَوْلىً شَيْئاً وَلاَ هُمْ يُنْصَرُونَ)

translations.text: "the day a master shall avail nothing a client, and they shall not be helped" (44:41);

pairs.arabic: حَمْداً يَرْتَفِعُ مِنَّا إلَى أَعْلَى عِلِّيِّينَ

translations.text: a praise which will rise up from us to the highest of the 'Illiyun
"in a book inscribed, witnessed by those brought nigh" (83:20-21),

pairs.arabic: حَمْداً تَقَرُّ بِهِ عُيُونُنَا إذَا بَرِقَت الابْصَارُ

translations.text: a praise whereby our eyes may be at rest when sight is dazzled,

pairs.arabic: وَتَبْيَضُّ بِهِ وُجُوهُنَا إذَا اسْوَدَّتِ الابْشَارُ،

translations.text: our faces whitened when skins are blackened,

pairs.arabic: حَمْداً نُعْتَقُ بِهِ مِنْ أَلِيمِ نار الله

translations.text: a praise through which we may be released from God's painful Fire
and enter God's generous neighbourhood,
a praise by which we may jostle the angels brought nigh
and join the prophets, the envoys,

pairs.arabic: فِي دَارِ الْمُقَامَةِ الَّتِي لا تَزُولُ

translations.text: in a House of Permanence that does not remove,
the Place of His Generosity that does not change.

pairs.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي اخْتَارَ لَنَا مَحَاسِنَ الْخَلْقِ

translations.text: Praise belongs to God, who chose for us the good qualities of creation,
granted us the agreeable things of provision,

pairs.arabic: وَجَعَلَ لَنَا الفَضِيلَةَ بِالْمَلَكَةِ عَلَى جَمِيعِ الْخَلْقِ

translations.text: and appointed for us excellence through domination over all creation;
every one of His creatures submits to us through His power
and comes to obey us through His might.

pairs.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ لله الَّذِي أَغْلَقَ عَنَّا بَابَ الْحَّاجَةِ إلاّ إلَيْهِ

translations.text: Praise belongs to God, who locked for us the gate of need except toward Him.

pairs.arabic: فَكَيْفَ نُطِيقُ حَمْدَهُ أَمْ مَتَى نُؤَدِّي شُكْرَهُ؟ لا، مَتى؟

translations.text: So how can we praise Him? When can we thank Him? Indeed, when?

pairs.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي رَكَّبَ فِينَا آلاَتِ الْبَسْطِ

translations.text: Praise belongs to God, who placed within us the organs of expansion,
assigned for us the agents of contraction,
gave us to enjoy the spirits of life,
fixed within us the limbs of works,
nourished us with the agreeable things of provision,
freed us from need through His bounty,
and gave us possessions through His kindness.
Then He commanded us that He might test our obedience

pairs.arabic: وَنَهَانَا لِيَبْتَلِيَ شُكْرَنَا فَخَالَفْنَا عَنْ طَرِيْقِ أمْرِهِ

translations.text: and prohibited us that He might try our thanksgiving. So we turned against the path of His commandments
and mounted the backs of His warnings.
Yet He hurried us not to His punishment,nor hastened us on to His vengeance, ,

pairs.arabic: بَلْ تَانَّانا بِرَحْمَتِهِ تَكَرُّماً، وَانْتَظَرَ مُراجَعَتَنَا بِرَأفَتِهِ حِلْماً.

translations.text: No, He went slowly with us through His mercy, in generosity, and awaited our return through His clemency, in mildness.
Praise belongs to God, who showed us the way to repentance,

pairs.arabic: الَّتِي لَمْ نُفِدْهَا إلاّ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ،

translations.text: which we would not have won save through His bounty.
Had we nothing to count as His bounty
but this, His trial of us would have been good,
His beneficence toward us great,
His bounty upon us immense.

pairs.arabic: فَمَا هكذا كَانَتْ سُنَّتُهُ فِي التَّوْبَةِ

translations.text: For such was not His wont in repentance
with those who went before us.
He has lifted up from us
"what we have not the strength to bear"(2:286) ,
charged us only to our capacity,
imposed upon us nothing but ease,

pairs.arabic: وَلَمْ يَدَعْ لاَحَـد مِنَّا حُجَّةً وَلاَ عُذْراً

translations.text: and left none of us with an argument or excuse.
So the perisher among us is he who perishes in spite of Him
and the felicitous among us he who beseeches Him.

pairs.arabic: وَ الْحَمْد للهِ بِكُلِّ مَا حَمِدَهُ بِهِ

translations.text: And praise belongs to God with all the praises of
His angels closest to Him,
His creatures most noble in His eyes,
and His praisers most pleasing to Him;
a praise that may surpass other praises
as our Lord surpasses all His creatures.
Then to Him belongs praise,
in place of His every favour upon us

pairs.arabic: وَ عَلى جَمِيعِ عِبَادِهِ الْمَاضِينَ وَالْبَاقِينَ

translations.text: and upon all His servants, past and still remaining,

pairs.arabic: عَدَدَ مَا أَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُهُ مِنْ جَمِيعِالاشْيَآءِ

translations.text: to the number of all things His knowledge encompasses,

pairs.arabic: وَ مَكَانَ كُلِّ وَاحِدَة مِنْهَا عَدَدُهَا

translations.text: and in place of each of His favours,

pairs.arabic: أَضْعافَاً مُضَاعَفَةً أَبَداً سَرْمَداً إلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ

translations.text: their number doubling and redoubling always and forever, to the Day of Resurrection;
a praise whose bound has no utmost end,
whose number has no reckoning,
whose limit cannot be reached,
whose period cannot be cut off;

pairs.arabic: حَمْدَاً يَكُونُ وُصْلَةً إلَى طَاعَتِهِ وَعَفْوِهِ

translations.text: a praise which will become a link to His obedience and pardon,
a tie to His good pleasure,
a means to His forgiveness,
a path to His Garden,
a protector against His vengeance,
a security against His wrath,
an aid to obeying Him,
a barrier against disobeying Him,

pairs.arabic: وَعَوْناً عَلَى تَأدِيَةِ حَقِّهِ وَ وَظائِفِهِ

translations.text: a help in fulfilling His right and His duties;

pairs.arabic: حَمْداً نَسْعَدُ بِهِ فِي السُّعَدَاءِ مِنْ أَوْلِيَآئِهِ

translations.text: a praise that will make us felicitous among His felicitous friends,

pairs.arabic: وَنَصِيرُ بِهِ فِي نَظْمِ الشُّهَدَآءِ بِسُيُوفِ أَعْدَائِهِ

translations.text: and bring us into the ranks of those martyred by the swords of His enemies.
He is a Friend, Praiseworthy!
